stories.title: Takeaways: Spurs rout Thunder to take Game 4
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the Spurs-Thunder series.

stories.title: Spurs shut down OKC in Game 4 to even series
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama set the tone from the beginning of Game 4 on Sunday as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

stories.title: 'Punched us in our face early': OKC flounders in G...
stories.summary: The Thunder turned in their worst offensive performance in years Sunday night in Game 4 as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

stories.title: MacKinnon injured as Avs face 'big hill to climb'
stories.summary: Center Nathan MacKinnon was hobbled after blocking a shot in the second period Sunday, and the Stanley Cup-favorite Avalanche eventually fell to the Vegas Golden Knights 5-3 in Game 3 of the Western Conference finals, a series Colorado now trails 3-0.

stories.title: Suarez, 'doing this for Kyle,' wins emotional 600
stories.summary: Daniel Suarez won the rain-shortened Coca-Cola 600 on Sunday night, capping an emotional day in which the auto racing world remembered the late Kyle Busch.
